task_completion.description: Create a new inventory item named 'Crystal Wine Decanter' with the description '750ml Lead-Free Crystal Decanter'
task_completion.visual_evidence: An item creation form or inventory list in NCH Copper POS showing the item name 'Crystal Wine Decanter' and description '750ml Lead-Free Crystal Decanter'.

task_completion.description: Set the unit cost to 25.00 and the sales price to 45.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item details screen showing a unit cost (or cost price) of 25.00 and a sales price of 45.00.

task_completion.description: Set the initial quantity of the item to 12
task_completion.visual_evidence: The item details or inventory list showing an initial stock quantity of 12 for the 'Crystal Wine Decanter'.

task_completion.description: Perform a stock quantity adjustment of -3 for the item
task_completion.visual_evidence: An inventory adjustment dialog, stock adjustment window, or transaction log showing a decrease of 3 units (-3) for the 'Crystal Wine Decanter'.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Shipping Damage' as the reason for the stock adjustment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The adjustment dialog or adjustment history showing the reason text 'Shipping Damage' associated with the -3 quantity change.

task_completion.description: Verify the updated inventory level is 9
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main inventory list or item details screen showing the final, updated quantity of the 'Crystal Wine Decanter' as exactly 9.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NCH Copper POS graphical user interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NCH Copper POS application windows being actively used (e.g., clicking buttons, typing in fields) rather than a terminal window executing SQL or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual NCH Copper POS software, not a text editor or mock interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly displays the authentic NCH Copper POS interface, menus, and dialog boxes.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply write the expected final state into a text file to simulate task completion
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of text editors (like Notepad) containing the task answers; all data entry and verification occurs within the POS system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The adjustment quantity is exactly -3. The initial quantity is 12. The final quantity must be exactly 9 (12 - 3 = 9).
